hero.headline: Be Your Own
hero.description: We create experiences beyond the classroom — into the real world through adventure, culture, and hands-on learning.

preview.title: Every experience is designed to help you grow through doing
preview.schoolsDescription: Custom local and international programs for primary through secondary schools — built around your learning objectives and group size.
preview.weekendDescription: Short, immersive weekend experiences in Saudi nature — built for connection, confidence, and lasting memories.

abdul.name: Abdul Explorer
abdul.credential: First Saudi to ski to the North Pole
abdul.tagline: If I can, You Can, We All Can.
abdul.description: Camp Explorer carries the same mindset Abdul brought to standing on top of the world — that growth lives at the edge of comfort.

closingCta.title: Ready to step out of your comfort zone?
closingCta.description: This is more than an experience. This is where growth begins.

metadata.title: About
metadata.description: Camp Explorer is built to take learning beyond the classroom — led by Abdul Explorer, the first Saudi to ski to the North Pole.

hero.headline: More than experiences
hero.subhead: Built to take learning beyond the classroom — into the real world.
hero.imageAlt: Abdul Explorer with local children in a yurt during a Central Asian expedition

mission.title: Camp Explorer was created to redefine how people learn
mission.body: We believe that learning should not be limited to classrooms. The most powerful growth happens when individuals step into real environments, face challenges, and experience the world first-hand.

pillars.confidence: This is where confidence is built

philosophy.lead: At Camp Explorer, everything we do is built on one belief:
philosophy.headline: Real experiences create real growth
philosophy.transformation: We don't focus on entertainment. We focus on transformation.

founder.name: Abdul Explorer
founder.intro: Abdul Explorer is a Saudi adventurer who has pushed his limits across the world — becoming the first Saudi to ski to the North Pole and stand on top of the world (90°N).
founder.tagline: His journeys were never about records. They were about proving something simple:
founder.quote: If I can, you can. We all can.
founder.bridge: Through Camp Explorer, he brings that mindset to the next generation — creating experiences that challenge individuals, build confidence, and unlock potential. From extreme expeditions to youth-focused programs, his journey is built on pushing limits and inspiring others to do the same.
founder.closing: This isn't about watching. It's about stepping in, taking action, and discovering what you're truly capable of.

contact.title: Talk to us before you go
contact.description: Questions about a program, a school booking, or whether your child is ready?
